title: Key Management, Rotation, HSMs, KMS, and Compromise · Go Semantics Case: Crypto Go Least Privilege Custody
summary: A platform stores a master key in source control, rotates aliases without proving old reads, grants every service decrypt authority, and has no compromise recovery drill. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the least privilege custody increment in key lifecycle, custody, and rotation runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Grant narrow sign, verify, encrypt, decrypt, wrap, unwrap, derive, rotate, export, and administer capabilities across separate identities.
Separate immutable key version, stable logical key ID, mutable alias, algorithm, purpose, state, and cryptoperiod.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Least Privilege Custody · Theory Crypto Go Least Privilege Cu…
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 1943 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce immutable key identity, state, cryptoperiod, least privilege, and tested recovery; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then repeat or roll back a nonce, sequence, or key version and reject the stale state. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Grant narrow sign, verify, encrypt, decrypt, wrap, unwrap, derive, rotate, export, and administer capabilities across separate identities.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Least Privilege Custody contract for the supplied data.
